summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. (1) Workflow references 'DependencyLicenseChecker.Tests.ps1' which is not provided—test job will fail immediately. (2) Task required red/green TDD with Pester tests; no test file exists. (3) test-workflow.ps1 doesn't implement required behavior: should create temp repos with fixtures, run act for multiple cases, validate exact output, and produce act-result.txt; instead runs act once with broken output capture. (4) DependencyLicenseChecker.ps1 lacks error handling (no file validation, no JSON parse try-catch, no Set-StrictMode), input validation (ManifestPath existence check missing). (5) Workflow embeds license lookup inline (lines 51-58, 63-66) instead of config; hardcoded data violates maintainability. (6) Start-Process redirect syntax in test-workflow.ps1 is broken and won't capture output. Would not execute successfully locally with act.
